Ethical Pharma Company – Andhra Pradesh

Crasenim Pharma – Products for Doctors in Andhra Pradesh

Crasenim Pharma is a WHO GMP certified, ethical pharmaceutical company headquartered in Vizianagaram, Andhra Pradesh. We partner with AKUMS DRUGS to supply quality medicines across the AP coastal belt — medicines that General Physicians, Cardiologists, Diabetologists, Gastroenterologists, and Paediatricians can prescribe with clinical confidence.

✅ WHO GMP Certified Manufacturing 🔬 Smartdose™ Technology 🏭 AKUMS DRUGS Manufactured 📍 Active in all AP districts
💬 Request Samples / Detailing View All Products
Why Prescribe Crasenim Pharma

Quality You Can Prescribe with Confidence

Every Crasenim Pharma product is manufactured under rigorous standards and designed for consistent clinical outcomes in your patients.

WHO GMP Certified

International Manufacturing Standards

All Crasenim Pharma products are manufactured by AKUMS DRUGS & Pharmaceuticals Ltd — India's largest contract pharmaceutical manufacturer — under WHO Good Manufacturing Practices. Each batch meets international quality specifications for identity, purity, potency, and uniformity.

Smartdose™ Technology

Advanced Controlled-Release Formulations

Smartdose™ technology is incorporated in our Telsenim-40 (Telmisartan) and Metsenim-G (Metformin PR + Glimepiride) products. It delivers sustained, optimised drug release — reducing peak-trough fluctuations, improving tolerability, and ensuring true once-daily efficacy for your patients.

Affordable Access

Prescriptions That Patients Fill

Competitive patient pricing ensures your prescription is actually dispensed — not substituted at the pharmacy counter. In AP's price-sensitive market, affordability directly translates to better patient adherence and improved long-term outcomes.

Ethical Practice

Quality Over Promotion

Crasenim Pharma operates as an ethical pharmaceutical company. Our MR team provides evidence-based product information, scientific literature, and genuine clinical value — supporting your prescribing decisions with substance rather than just marketing.

By Speciality

Crasenim Pharma Products for Your Speciality

General Physicians

Full Range Relevance

GPs benefit from the entire Crasenim portfolio — Amoxsenim-CV 625 for infections, Telsenim-40 for hypertension, Metsenim-G for diabetes, Pansenim-DSR for GI complaints, and Crasenim-LC for nutritional support.

View all products →
Cardiologists & Physicians

Cardiac Range

Telsenim-40 (Telmisartan 40mg, Smartdose™) for 24-hour BP control. Telsenim-AM and Telsenim-H for combination hypertension therapy. Strong 24-hour coverage particularly relevant for morning surge management.

Cardiac range details →
Diabetologists & Endocrinologists

Diabetic Range

Metsenim-G1 and Metsenim-G2 (Metformin 500mg PR + Glimepiride 1mg/2mg, Smartdose™). PR Metformin for improved GI tolerability; Glimepiride for synergistic glycaemic control in T2DM.

Diabetic range details →
Gastroenterologists

Gastro Range

Pansenim-DSR (Pantoprazole 40mg + Domperidone 30mg SR). Dual-action formulation for GERD with dyspepsia and motility disorders. DSR technology for optimised release kinetics.

Gastro range details →
Neurologists & Physicians

Nutritional Range

Crasenim-LC (Mecobalamin 1500mcg + Folic Acid 1.5mg + L-Carnitine 500mg). For peripheral neuropathy, B12 deficiency, fatigue, and muscular support. Strong co-prescription with antidiabetics.

Nutritional range details →
Paediatricians & Dermatologists

Pediatric Skin Care

Crasenim Bar — pH 5.5 Syndet Baby Bar with Glycerin, Aloe, and Shea Butter. Gentle daily skin care for sensitive and eczema-prone infants. Designed to maintain the infant skin acid mantle.

Pediatric range details →
Sample Requests & Detailing

How to Request Product Samples or Schedule a Detailing Visit

Via WhatsApp (Fastest)

WhatsApp us at +91 99890 74806 with your name, speciality, and location. Our area MR will contact you to arrange a visit with product samples and detailing cards at your convenience.

Via Email

Email your request to crasenimpharma@gmail.com with your name, clinic address, and the products you'd like information about. Our team will respond within 1–2 working days.

For Doctors Outside Our Active MR Coverage Area

If you are in a district where we don't currently have an MR visiting, our head office team can still provide product literature by email or arrange a direct visit on request. Contact us at crasenimpharma@gmail.com.

FAQs

Crasenim Pharma – FAQ for Doctors

Are Crasenim Pharma products available at pharmacies across Andhra Pradesh?
Yes. Crasenim Pharma products are available through our distributor and franchise network across the AP coastal belt. If your patients report difficulty finding the product at their local pharmacy, please contact us and we'll help resolve supply.
Who manufactures Crasenim Pharma's products?
All Crasenim Pharma products are manufactured by AKUMS DRUGS & Pharmaceuticals Ltd — India's largest contract pharmaceutical manufacturer. AKUMS operates 13 manufacturing units across India, all certified to WHO GMP, ISO 9001:2015, and other international standards.
What is Smartdose™ technology and which products use it?
Smartdose™ is Crasenim Pharma's controlled-release formulation technology. It is used in Telsenim-40 (Telmisartan) for 24-hour sustained BP control and in Metsenim-G (Metformin PR + Glimepiride) for improved GI tolerability and smooth glycaemic control. The technology ensures optimal drug release kinetics, reducing peak-trough fluctuations and improving patient compliance.
How can I contact the MR for my area in Andhra Pradesh?
WhatsApp us at +91 99890 74806 with your city and clinic details. We'll connect you with the MR covering your territory or arrange a direct company visit for districts where we're expanding.

Connect with Crasenim Pharma's Medical Team

Request product samples, arrange a detailing visit, or learn more about our AP coverage. We're here to support your clinical practice.
